message:
The other day, I had a little win that felt like a big deal! With winter storms looming, I decided to check our emergency kit. I was pleasantly surprised to find that I’d stocked up on snacks and flashlights, but then it hit me—I hadn’t updated our family contacts list in ages! So, I spent a cozy afternoon refreshing it, adding a few new numbers and removing old ones. 

That simple task made me feel so much more prepared. It’s amazing how a small step can bring such peace of mind, especially when the weather outside is less than friendly. 

Have you had any small wins in your prep journey lately? This little refresher helped me a lot!
